CustomField.description: Role or title of the person who logged these hours (e.g. Sr SFDC Developer, Salesforce Administrator). Auto-populated from User.Title on insert, editable for override. Shown on invoice time log detail.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Your role for this time entry (e.g. "Sr SFDC Developer"). Auto-filled from your user profile.
CustomField.label: Resource Title
